properties.name: min
properties.description: Sets the minimum date and time that can be selected

properties.name: min-date
properties.description: Sets the minimum date that can be selected

properties.name: min-time
properties.description: Sets the minimum time that can be selected

properties.name: max
properties.description: Sets the maximum date and time that can be selected

properties.name: max-date
properties.description: Sets the maximum date that can be selected

properties.name: max-time
properties.description: Sets the maximum time that can be selected

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Sets the field to be readonly

properties.name: required
properties.description: Sets the field to be required

properties.name: seconds-step
properties.description: Sets the step between (and activates) seconds in the time picker

properties.name: value
properties.description: Sets the current date and time value

events.name: input
events.description: Emitted when the value is changed by the user.

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the value is changed by the user.

events.name: clear-click
events.description: Event emitted when the clear button is clicked.

slots.name: helper-text
slots.description: Add rich text for as field's helper text

slots.name: contextual-help
slots.description: Allows you to add the [Contextual Help](/components/contextual-help/) component to be displayed next to the label.
